message:
fix(abi): cross-subsystem correctness fixes for dirent, poll, process, signal, string, termios, time, and wchar

dirent_abi:
- Fix readdir_r to properly distinguish EOF from error by saving/clearing
  errno before calling readdir and checking it afterward, matching POSIX
  readdir_r semantics where return value 0 + *result==NULL means EOF, and
  return value != 0 means error.
- Route scandir's internal malloc/free through frankenlibc's allocator
  instead of libc::malloc/free, ensuring the returned entries are
  allocated from the membrane-managed arena and can be safely freed with
  the interposed free().

dlfcn_abi:
- Extract dlvsym_next() helper to centralize RTLD_NEXT lookups via
  libc::dlvsym, used by startup_abi to avoid routing through the
  interposed dlsym.

poll_abi:
- Add aarch64 support: aarch64 Linux does not provide SYS_poll or
  SYS_select, so poll() now uses SYS_ppoll with a converted timespec,
  and select() uses SYS_pselect6 with a converted timespec. x86_64
  retains the direct SYS_poll/SYS_select paths.

process_abi:
- Fix execvp_via_execve and execvpe to read errno from the host's
  __errno_location via last_host_errno() instead of reading our
  interposed errno. After a failed execve syscall, the error code is
  in the host errno, not the frankenlibc errno.

setjmp_abi:
- Replace libc::abort() with std::process::abort() in
  terminate_deferred_transfer to avoid re-entering the interposed
  signal infrastructure during termination.

signal_abi:
- Fix sigwait error path to use last_host_errno() instead of reading
  our interposed errno, matching the process_abi fix.

startup_abi:
- Use the new dlfcn_abi::dlvsym_next() helper instead of calling
  libc::dlvsym(RTLD_NEXT, ...) directly, avoiding potential symbol
  resolution loops during startup.

string_abi:
- Fix stpncpy return pointer: measure the written length from dst
  (which may have been clamped by the membrane) rather than scanning
  the source, so the returned pointer respects any healing/truncation
  that occurred during the copy.
- Fix strncat truncation detection: only report truncation when the
  source string was clamped by its allocation bound (not by the caller's
  n parameter), preventing false-positive truncation warnings for normal
  bounded concatenation.

termios_abi:
- Fix tcsendbreak to use TCSBRKP ioctl when duration > 0 (which sends
  a break for the specified duration) and TCSBRK when duration == 0,
  matching POSIX semantics. Previously TCSBRK was always used with the
  duration argument, which TCSBRK ignores.

time_abi:
- Replace libc::strlen with scan_c_string for format string length
  measurement in strftime, using the membrane-aware bounded scanner
  instead of the raw host strlen.

wchar_abi:
- Route wcsdup allocation through frankenlibc's malloc instead of
  libc::malloc for consistency with the membrane allocator.
- Replace libc::strlen calls with scan_c_string in mbstowcs, mbsrtowcs,
  basename, and dirname to use membrane-aware bounded scanning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
